query: Create diataxis documentation for this flask app. The main routes are in app/routes.py and the models are in app/models.py

help me learn about fractions, I'm going back to school next semester and need to brush up on my math before taking calc 1
score the diataxis documentation and tell me what needs to improve. focus especially on the tutorials — i think they might be drifting into explanation territory
update the diataxis docs to add a new topic about authentication. we just added OAuth2 support and it needs tutorials, a how-to for configuring providers, and reference docs for the new endpoints

review the diataxis documentation for quality. some of the how-to guides feel more like tutorials and I want to fix the cross-contamination
Make a learning path for me to refresh my high school math. I need to get through algebra and trig before September. I learn best with exercises and I want to track my progress
the reference docs in diataxis/reference/ are way too narrative. they should be tables and concise descriptions. can you fix them and re-score?
i want to really understand how git branching works under the hood — not just the commands but what's actually happening with the DAG, refs, and merge strategies. make me something comprehensive
write a README.md for this project that explains what it does, how to install it, and the basic API
can you add docstrings to all the functions in src/utils.py? they're missing type hints too
generate API documentation from the OpenAPI spec at docs/openapi.yaml using redoc
help me write a blog post about our migration from REST to GraphQL. it should cover the technical decisions we made and lessons learned
I need to set up sphinx autodoc for this python project. can you configure conf.py and generate the initial rst files from the source code?
create a man page for this CLI tool. it takes --input, --output, and --format flags. here's the argparse setup in cli.py
help me write unit tests for the authentication module. we're using pytest and need to mock the OAuth provider

set up mkdocs with the material theme for this project. I want auto-generated nav from the docs/ directory structure
